entity.label: Hillel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Praising, a Pirathonite, father of the judge Abdon (Judg. 12:13, 15).

nodes.label: Hillel
nodes.description: Praising, a Pirathonite, father of the judge Abdon (Judg. 12:13, 15).

nodes.label: Abdon
nodes.description: The son of Hillel, a Pirathonite, the tenth judge of Israel (Judg. 12:13-15). He is probably the Bedan of 1 Sam. 12:11.

verses.text: And after him Abdon the son of Hillel, a Pirathonite, judged Israel.
And Abdon the son of Hillel the Pirathonite died, and was buried in Pirathon in the land of Ephraim, in the mount of the Amalekites.
